drivers.description: Weak cipher suites detected on 2 endpoints
Database encryption at rest not confirmed

findings.title: TLS 1.0 Enabled
findings.description: Server supports deprecated TLS 1.0 protocol which has known vulnerabilities.
findings.remediation: Disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1 in server configuration; require TLS 1.2 or higher.

findings.title: Weak Cipher Suite Detected
findings.description: Server supports RC4 cipher suite which is vulnerable to several attacks.
findings.remediation: Remove RC4 from the cipher suite configuration and prefer AES-GCM suites.

findings.title: SSH Uses Weak Host Key Algorithm
findings.description: SSH server offers RSA-1024 host key, which is insufficient for modern security.
findings.remediation: Generate and deploy ED25519 or RSA-4096 host keys.

nodes.title: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1
nodes.why: TLS 1.0 is deprecated and vulnerable to BEAST/POODLE attacks.

nodes.title: Remove RC4 cipher suites
nodes.why: RC4 is cryptographically broken and should not be used.

nodes.title: Upgrade SSH host keys to ED25519
nodes.why: RSA-1024 keys provide insufficient security margin.

nodes.title: Evaluate post-quantum cryptography migration
nodes.why: RSA and ECDSA are vulnerable to quantum computer attacks.

edges.reason: Both are TLS hygiene fixes; address together
Complete cipher hygiene before key upgrades

identity_findings.title: Kerberos Using RC4-HMAC
identity_findings.description: Kerberos domain supports RC4-HMAC (arcfour-hmac), which is cryptographically weak.
identity_findings.remediation: Configure domain to require AES256-CTS-HMAC-SHA1-96 only.

identity_findings.title: DNSSEC Using RSASHA1
identity_findings.description: DNSSEC zone signing uses RSASHA1 algorithm, which is deprecated.
identity_findings.remediation: Migrate DNSSEC zone signing to ECDSAP256SHA256 or RSASHA256.

motion_findings.title: TLS 1.0 Active on HTTPS
motion_findings.remediation: Configure web server to reject TLS versions below 1.2.

motion_findings.title: SMTP Without STARTTLS
motion_findings.description: SMTP server does not offer or enforce STARTTLS upgrade.
motion_findings.remediation: Enable STARTTLS in SMTP server config and set require_tls=yes.

dar_findings.title: PostgreSQL Encryption at Rest Not Confirmed
dar_findings.description: PostgreSQL database does not have transparent data encryption enabled.
dar_findings.remediation: Enable PostgreSQL TDE or use filesystem-level encryption (LUKS/dm-crypt).

dar_findings.title: S3-Compatible Object Storage Without Server-Side Encryption
dar_findings.description: MinIO bucket does not have server-side encryption enabled.
dar_findings.remediation: Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS on all buckets storing sensitive data.
